Tokens.Value: "Supported Discovery Workspace Services endpoints (protocol and hostname, for example: https://{workspaceName}.discovery.azure.com)."

"Get the status of a long-running operation."

"Stop the discovery engine for an investigation."

"Operations for message logs in a conversation."
"List message logs in the specified conversation."
"OData filter expression. Supported fields: investigationId, status, createdByType, priority, createdAt, lastModifiedAt. Example: status eq 'new' or status eq 'executing'"
"Patch (partial update) a task (e.g. status, description, validation requirements, dependencies, result)."
"Add an execution history entry to a task."
"Used for to poll status of a Tool run."
"Array of confirmations related to this message."
"A message list item containing just the message name."
"A copilot log related to a message."
"The identifier of the conversation this log belongs to."
"The identifier of the message this log is associated with."
"The timestamp of the log entry in ISO 8601 format."
"The type of activity for this log entry."
"The name of the tool, if applicable."
"The arguments passed to the tool, if applicable."
"Indicates if this log entry represents an action."
"The text content of the log entry."
"The status of the activity represented by this log entry."
"The creation time of the log entry (Unix timestamp)."
"The completion time of the log entry (Unix timestamp)."
"The priority of the task (higher numbers = higher priority)."
"Array of validation requirements for the task."
"ID of the parent task if this is a subtask."
"IDs of tasks that must complete before this task can be executed."
"IDs of tasks that are related to this task."
"Application or user assigned to this task."
"Type of entity that created the resource (User, Application, System, or custom type)."
"History of execution events for this task."
"The investigation identifier associated with the task."
"Task execution result with text and storage assets."

"List of data assets related to the task."
"The name of the conversation these suggestions are for."
"The timestamp when the suggestions were generated."

"Timestamp when the entry was created (ISO 8601 UTC format)."
"The action that was performed (controlled vocabulary; semi-open)."
"Identifier of who created this entry (GUID for user | resourceId for application | arbitrary string for other types)."
"Type of entity that created this entry (User, Application, System, or custom type)."
"Run or message ID for full details."
"Bound the number of results that come back in one response."
"Explicitly set tool run requirements - overrides the tool definition."
"Override the number of replicas of the tool image to run."
"Override the image to use for this tool run."
"A file to be included in the input data for a tool run and the path where it will be mounted, relative to the working directory."

"The user that started the tool run."
"Details provided by the tool (rather than the platform)."
"Assignee that will execute the task. Optional."
